catalysts_general: Qatar LNG strikes sidelined 12.8 MTPA (17% capacity) for 3-5 years. Stock surged 28% to ATH ~$297. RSI in low 80s. D/E 202%. Insider sold 4,100 shares. BofA target $322. (Tier 1: U.S. News, Benzinga)

Discovery: Iran missile strikes knocked out 12.8 MTPA of Qatar LNG capacity (17%) with 3-5 year repair timeline; as America's largest LNG exporter with 94% contracted capacity, Cheniere is direct structural beneficiary of the supply gap. Asian LNG spot prices doubled to 3-year highs.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Qatar disruption is real multi-year tailwind but technically overbought at ATH; insider selling, D/E 202% — wait for pullback

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: 2026 bookings guidance $1.27-1.30B missed consensus $1.39B. MAU declined QoQ. Insiders net sellers ($9.1M vs $499K bought). CEO sacrificing near-term for AI-first pivot. (Tier 1: earnings release, SEC Form 4)

Discovery: AVOID — AI disruption victim with shares down 42% in 2026; 2026 bookings guidance of $1.27-1.30B missed Street estimates of $1.39B; CEO admitted deliberately sacrificing near-term financial growth; generative AI tools can now deliver basic tutoring/translation at near-zero cost, threatening the premium value of Duolingo Max subscriptions.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheap at 11.4x P/E but AI disruption is existential; insiders net selling despite 82% drawdown is damning signal
